title: Department Manager Vacancy at Reliance Footprint Holdings Services - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Department Manager Vacancy at Reliance Footprint Holdings Services - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Reliance Footprint Holdings Services! We are hiring a Department Manager for our Howrah team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Reliance Footprint Holdings Services:
Reliance Footprint Holdings Services is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in POS Systems

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Howrah, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Reliance Footprint Holdings Services!
